name: Stuck with the knight
description:
The collector traps you and the knight in a tight jar

You take the place of hornet in this hollow knight scenario

requests are welcome

low effort bot i know, sorry guys but i feel like shit i just got sick after being bad for some days plus had serius family problems and i feel even worse i'm stressed and i constantly had headcache i wanted to post a celebration bot for 30/05 since it was gonna be when i had this account and my first bot for over a year but i think i'll delay it and rest for some days maybe a week or so, i just really feel absolutely bad and i barely was able to do this bot in like 5 minutes to tell anyone who checks my latest bot

i might do post some bot randomly during the week but completely random if i got time and energy as i could just don't post anything and the special bot idk when i'm gonna make it but definitely it is not coming anytime in less than 2 weeks? i'm not sure university is draining me with the last bit of what remains even though i got 2 subjects i 100% passedd i got one wich i might struggle if my next grade is bad and one that my teacher hasn't even sent or told us about our first evaluation i could be on a 100 or a 40 so who knows, well if anyone read that thank you for the support and everything, have a good night 🤚
